embeddedRouteExceptions.src/pages/KubernetesClustersPage.tsx: Delegates canonical route composition to the Dashboard inventory surface.
embeddedRouteExceptions.src/pages/VirtualMachinesPage.tsx: Delegates route composition to list, overview, resource, settings, and chat subviews.
embeddedRouteExceptions.src/pages/KubernetesClusterDetailPage.ts: Full-height target workbench embeds tab-specific views inside a stable split-pane shell.
embeddedRouteExceptions.src/pages/WorkspaceInvitePage.tsx: Focused invitation handoff intentionally uses a centered task surface instead of authenticated route chrome.
embeddedRouteExceptions.src/pages/NotFoundPage.tsx: Recovery-only error route intentionally uses a centered task surface instead of authenticated route chrome.
